testcase.name: test_monthly_send_uses_configured_list

failure.message: AssertionError: monthly/send returned skipped despite configured report_recipients — endpoint not wired to _resolve_recipients (bug) assert 'skipped' != 'skipped' + where 'skipped' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf806bd3f0240>('status') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf806bd3f0240> = {'reason': 'Aucun destinataire fourni', 'status': 'skipped'}.get

testcase.failure: E AssertionError: monthly/send returned skipped despite configured report_recipients — endpoint not wired to _resolve_recipients (bug) assert 'skipped' != 'skipped' + where 'skipped' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf806bd3f0240>('status') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf806bd3f0240> = {'reason': 'Aucun destinataire fourni', 'status': 'skipped'}.get
